title: Fill Me Up, Oh Lord
html: INTRO: C C C/A# C G# A# C C C/A# C G# G#/F A# G/B C C C Im coming after you G Where others fail to follow C I hear you calling me G Your sweet fragrance draws me C F Into the place of your holy presence C F The place of your embrace C F Gsus4 G The place where I am overwhelmed by your love G# A#/G# G# A# Csus4 C Csus4 C All creation anxiously waits for the manifestation of your glory in me G# A# Here I am, oh Lord G#9/C A#/D Manifest yourself to me Gsus4 G Manifest yourself through me C Fill me up, oh Lord Bb9 Fill me up, oh Lord Fm Gm7 Csus4 C I will answer your call to this generation C Fill me up, oh Lord Bb9 Fill me up, oh Lord Fm Gm7 Csus4 C I will answer your call to this generation
